title: Implementation Result
description: Structured output from a code implementation step. Emitted by Backend Developer, Frontend Developer, Mobile Engineer, 3D Graphics Engineer, or Cloudflare Engineer per delivery slice. Used by Technical Lead, Reviewer, Agent Coordinator, and QA Engineer for phase gate evidence. One document per slice.

slice_id.description: Slice ID from technical-delivery-plan.json that this result closes.

delivery_plan_ref.description: Reference to the technical-delivery-plan.json work_title or file path.

feature_ticket_ref.description: Feature ticket ID or path this implementation addresses.

adr_refs.description: ADR IDs or paths that governed this implementation.

files_changed.description: List of files created, modified, deleted, or renamed.

architecture_impact.description: Brief statement of architectural impact, or 'none' if isolated change.

breaking_changes.description: Whether the change introduces breaking changes to public contracts, APIs, or event schemas.

breaking_change_details.description: Required when breaking_changes=true. Describes what breaks, who is affected, and migration path.

contracts_changed.description: Paths to api-contract-spec.json, event schema files, or other contract artifacts changed.

validation_run.description: Status of automated validation checks run before emitting this result.

ai_code_tier.description: AI-generated code risk tier validated (from backend-developer.md AI Governance section).

observability_added.description: Whether OTel instrumentation was added for new integration points (required when applicable).

observability_notes.description: Describe new spans, attributes, or trace context propagation added.

residual_risks.description: Known risks that remain after implementation and require follow-up.

qa_focus_areas.description: Specific behaviors, edge cases, or regressions QA should prioritize.

operational_notes.description: Config, migration, rollout, monitoring, or rollback notes for DevOps or SRE.

open_questions.description: Unresolved questions requiring follow-up before or after merge.

files_changed.summary: Added COD store order routing logic; preserved existing auto-assign flow for non-COD orders.
Unit tests for new COD routing branch — covers happy path and store-not-found edge case.

examples.architecture_impact: none — isolated to order assignment command; no shared service boundary changed
residual_risks: COD store lookup fallback behavior not yet covered by integration test — deferred to QA.
qa_focus_areas: COD order with no matching store
non-COD orders not affected by new branch
examples.operational_notes: No migration required. Feature flag not needed — change is additive.
